title: Spencer's Retail is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Spencer's Retail is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Spencer's Retail family as a E-commerce Executive in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Spencer's Retail:
Spencer's Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail!
